heading: Get AWS Account ID and VPC ID for a Project
body:
If you want to create inbound VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) peering connections to your stream processing workspace,
you first need to retrieve the AWS (Amazon Web Services) account ID, the AWS (Amazon Web Services) VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) ID, and
the CIDR (Classless Inter-Domain Routing) block associated with your Atlas project to initiate a VPC (Virtual Private Cloud)
peering request from an external cloud environment.

To retrieve the AWS (Amazon Web Services) account ID, the AWS (Amazon Web Services) VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) ID, and the CIDR (Classless Inter-Domain Routing) block for an
Atlas project using the Atlas Administration API, see
[Returns the Account ID, and the VPC ID for the group and region specified](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-getgroupstreamaccountdetails)
